headline: Why The Northern Trust (NTRS) Story Is Shifting As Targets Rise And New Mandates Build
summary: Price targets on Northern Trust have been lifted in recent research, even as the modelled fair value remains anchored at US$157.11 per share. Analysts point to sector wide repricing, expectations for healthier capital markets into 2026, and a cluster of new mandates and service extensions as reasons to refresh targets across trust banks, with Northern Trust firmly in that group. As you read on, you will see what is driving this evolving narrative and how to track it over time. Analyst Price...

headline: Northern Trust Marks 35 Years in Canada with Strong New Business Momentum
summary: TORONTO, March 18, 2026--Northern Trust added more than CAD$90 billion in assets under custody from Canadian asset owners in 2025.

headline: Is Northern Trust Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Northern Trust has outpaced the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain cautious about the stock’s prospects.
